pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Legal Per-Document LoRA TTT + GPTQ-lite (mean val_bpb=0.7139, 3 seeds)

output.summary: Per-document accumulators force loss scoring before LoRA updates while GPTQ-lite multi-percentile int6 quant and a larger LoRA budget keep validation legal and tight.
techniques: Per-document accumulators ensure each token is scored before its LoRA update
GPTQ-lite multi-percentile int6 quant minimizes per-row clipping errors
Extended LoRA budget (rank16, multi-epoch with shorter docs)
